meta.title: Cheongpyeonghada | Private Whole-House Pension in Gapyeong, Korea
meta.description: Premium private pension along the Bukhan River in Gapyeong. 2,000㎡ grounds, river view, wood-fired BBQ. Up to 6 guests. Your exclusive healing retreat.
meta.keywords: Gapyeong pension, private pension Korea, Bukhan River view, Korea villa rental, Cheongpyeonghada, Gapyeong stay

hero.title: Tranquility on 2,000㎡ along the Bukhan River
hero.subtitle: An exclusive private retreat in Cheongpyeong, Gapyeong
hero.imageAlt: Exterior view of Cheongpyeonghada with mountain backdrop

about.label: About
about.title: A Complete Rest in Nature
about.description: Perched on a sprawling 2,000㎡ estate overlooking the Bukhan River, Cheongpyeonghada is a singular private retreat. Surrender the noise of everyday life amid lush lawns and tranquil riverside vistas.
about.imageAlt: Living room interior with vaulted ceiling and wood-burning fireplace

items.title: Complete Privacy
items.description: One booking at a time — the entire estate is yours alone

items.title: Expansive Lawn
items.description: A verdant garden sprawling across the 2,000㎡ estate

items.title: River Panorama
items.description: Four seasons of the Bukhan River, framed by your living room

items.title: Oak-fired Barbecue
items.description: A personally hosted oak-wood barbecue experience

accommodation.label: Details
accommodation.title: Accommodation Guide
accommodation.about: [Cheongpyeonghada] derives from the Korean words meaning integrity and fairness — the very etymology of the Cheongpyeong region. We remain steadfast in running this space with honesty and care, crafting a clear and peaceful sanctuary. Let us comfort your weary days like a deep, restful sleep.

items.label: Living Room
items.desc: Sofa, dining table, chairs, A/C, turntable, fireplace (decorative only)

items.label: 2nd Floor
items.desc: Tea table, A/C, extra bedding provided for additional guests

items.label: Kitchen
items.desc: Toaster, electric kettle, frying pan, pot, plates, refrigerator, microwave, induction stove, cutlery, wine glasses, mugs

items.label: Bathroom
items.desc: Hand wash, shampoo, conditioner, body wash

rules.title: House Rules
items: Security deposit: ₩100,000 (refunded within 12 hours if no issues)
Extra guest: ₩30,000 per person / Free for infants under 12 months
Check-in must be completed by 8:00 PM
Strictly no exceeding reserved guests or unregistered visitors (eviction without refund)
No parties, loud music, or excessive noise after 10:00 PM
Smoking outside designated areas: ₩100,000 fine + eviction (includes e-cigarettes)
Wash dishes after use, separate recyclables
No balloons or adhesives on wallpaper (repair costs apply)

bbq.title: Barbecue
bbq.note: Advance reservation required (on-site payment or bank transfer)

cancellation.title: Cancellation & Refund Policy
items: 7 days or less / No-show: No refund

notes.title: Important Notes
items: No exceeding max capacity or unregistered visitors
Minors must be accompanied by a guardian
No personal heating devices or fire hazard materials
CCTV installed on exterior, staff on-site

items.alt: Pristine bedroom with two king-size beds
Retro VHS display under warm lighting
Interior hallway with bath and bedroom views
